scripts.dev:desktop:shell: node scripts/wait-for-port.cjs --port 3000 && node scripts/wait-for-port.cjs --port 5173 && pnpm --filter @ai-novel/desktop dev
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @ai-novel/shared build && pnpm --filter @ai-novel/server build && pnpm --filter @ai-novel/client build
scripts.build:desktop:all: pnpm --filter @ai-novel/shared build && pnpm --filter @ai-novel/server prisma:generate && pnpm --filter @ai-novel/server build && pnpm --filter @ai-novel/client build:desktop && pnpm --filter @ai-novel/desktop build
scripts.dist:desktop:nsis: pnpm run stage:desktop && node desktop/scripts/run-electron-builder.cjs --win nsis --x64
scripts.dist:desktop:portable: pnpm run stage:desktop && node desktop/scripts/run-electron-builder.cjs --win portable --x64
scripts.verify:desktop-package: pnpm run stage:desktop && node desktop/scripts/run-electron-builder.cjs --dir --win --x64 && node desktop/scripts/verify-desktop-package.cjs
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @ai-novel/shared build && pnpm --filter @ai-novel/server typecheck && pnpm --filter @ai-novel/client typecheck && pnpm --filter @ai-novel/desktop typecheck
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @ai-novel/shared lint && pnpm --filter @ai-novel/server lint && pnpm --filter @ai-novel/client lint
